target: reservoir keeps a single test pipe speaking during a realistic hand-bellows cadence
method: non-playing wind-system mule with one test pipe; listen/observe onset and steadiness
action: Revise reservoir volume or bellows fold before further build

target: reservoir does not collapse or produce an unwanted attack transient when one pallet opens
method: mule test: open one pallet, observe reservoir behavior
action: Revise reservoir sizing or check-valve strategy

target: windchest stays sealed with no keys pressed
method: soap-solution or manometer leak check on sealed windchest
tolerance: no audible or measurable leak (target TBD)
action: Rework channel sealing surfaces or gaskets

target: pallet opens and reseats without slap, stick, or excessive touch weight
method: hand-operate pallet under mule wind pressure; note travel and touch weight
action: Adjust pallet travel, facing material, or return force

target: opening a second pallet does not reveal an unacceptable shared-channel wind drop
method: mule test: open two pallets together, compare pipe speech to single-pallet case
action: Revise windchest channel layout or reservoir capacity

target: key travel and pallet lift are repeatable and quiet across the row
method: measure key travel and listen for reseating noise across all keys
action: Adjust key guides, stops, or pallet lift geometry

target: test pipe speaks cleanly without choke or chirp across a realistic bellows cadence
method: mule test with representative pipe branch (open or stopped, undecided)
action: Revisit pipe scale, mouth/flue geometry, or wind stability before releasing a pipe-scale table

target: case support mode does not twist the windchest or change pallet seal behavior
method: handle mockup in candidate support modes (strap, lap, table) while operating bellows and keys
action: Revise case bracing or support mode before committing to CAD
